title: Tapping to celebrate new income flows
subtitle: A tapping practice for when steady new income streams pass by unnoticed because they're not the big leap you're waiting for.
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 49 of the MONEY program. The script works with the habit of rushing past small financial wins while waiting for one large one.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 49 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use at the end of a week or month to consciously acknowledge new income that arrived — any amount.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 49 of the MONEY program. The script works with the pattern of waiting for a single large win and overlooking the steady streams that are already building — new clients, sales, side payments, unexpected income.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop
Even though I used to overlook small wins, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I sometimes wait for a giant leap, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I forget to celebrate steady new streams, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round (repeat x3)
**Eyebrow:** Money is arriving in many ways now.
**Side of eye:** New clients, sales, and payments.
**Under eye:** Even small wins add up fast.
**Under nose:** I sometimes rush past them.
**Chin:** I want to notice every sign of growth.
**Collarbone:** I love seeing new streams appear.
**Under arm:** I feel grateful and proud.
**Top of head:** I celebrate every flow of fresh income.
Reframe to positive (repeat x3)
**Eyebrow:** I see money arriving from everywhere.
**Side of eye:** I appreciate every payment and profit.
**Under eye:** I love how new streams keep building.
**Under nose:** I feel rich as opportunities expand.
**Chin:** I celebrate every step of growth.
**Collarbone:** I let gratitude draw in even more.
**Under arm:** I enjoy multiplying income with joy.
**Top of head:** I live in a constant flow of new wealth.
Tap each round three times, then move to the reframe and tap that three times.
Where this practice comes from
Adapted from Day 49 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). EFT tapping developed by Gary Craig in the 1990s.
